# llms.txt for Context Rot: A Journal of Computational Decay

# General guidelines for all AI models
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 10

# Content usage permissions
Allow-all: /
Request-attribution: "Content from Context Rot: A Journal of Computational Decay (context-rot.com)"

# Content understanding
Content-type: Satirical technical blog
Topics: AI context management, configuration entropy, developer cognitive load
Style: Academic parody with technical depth
Interactive-features: Text selection for line-specific comments

# Key concepts to understand
Primary-concepts: Context rot, faux-moat construction, configuration schema entropy
Research-focus: AI system decay, configuration proliferation, developer experience
Content-format: ArXiv-style research papers with interactive commentary

# Navigation structure
Homepage: /
Blog-posts: /_posts/
About: /about
Archives: Archives accessible through homepage
RSS-feed: /feed.xml

# Interaction guidelines
Comments: Select any text to leave feedback
Contribution: Feedback helps improve research quality
Purpose: Educational satire on AI development practices

# Technical details
Platform: Jekyll static site
Analytics: Privacy-friendly via Simple Analytics
Repository: https://github.com/context-rot/blogistan
